title: QuantumTools
body:
# QuantumTools **QuantumTools** is a Minecraft mod that introduces powerful, progression‑friendly tools designed to streamline building, mining, and resource management. The mod stays faithful to vanilla balance while offering meaningful utility improvements that enhance mid‑ to late‑game gameplay. Current tools include the **Quantum Storage Ring** and the **Matrix Pickaxe**, each offering unique abilities and smooth integration into standard Minecraft progression. ---

## Features ### Quantum Storage Ring (QSR) The **Quantum Storage Ring** is a compact but incredibly powerful inventory‑management tool. - Stores selected block types in a **virtual internal inventory**, freeing valuable player storage space. - Automatically maintains **up to one stack** per chosen block type in the player’s real inventory. - Continuously refills hotbar and inventory slots as blocks are **placed, broken, crafted, or moved**. - Storage is **persistent across deaths** and can be accessed by **any player who equips the ring**. - Can be found as rare loot in **dungeon‑type structures**, including: - Dungeons - Ancient City chests - Pillager Outposts - Other challenging world‑gen structures --- ### Matrix Pickaxe The **Matrix Pickaxe** is a late‑game upgrade to the traditional Netherite pickaxe, designed for rapid terrain clearing. - Functions as a powerful **3×3×3 area‑of‑effect** mining tool. - Has **double the durability** of a Netherite pickaxe. - Repairable using: - **Amethyst Shards** - **Echo Shards** - Crafted using a **Matrix Pickaxe Upgrade** smithing template. - The smithing template generates as a **rare loot drop** in: - Dungeons - Ancient City chests - Pillager Outposts - Other advanced or dangerous structures --- QuantumTools is designed to complement any modpack or survival world by offering meaningful upgrades that remain balanced, immersive, and fun. ## Modpack Permission Feel free to use this mod in any modpack.
